V_DEVIATION.description: Logs structural hardware anomalies, faults, and deviations across the facility.

columns.START_TM: TIMESTAMP - The exact date and time when the parameter fault occurred
columns.PARAMETER: VARCHAR - The name of the fault component parameter (voltage, gas, current)
columns.SPAN: NUMBER - The physical scale or numerical magnitude of the anomaly alert

V_SUMMARIZE_GASCUTTING_MACHINE.description: Tracks utility processing logs and travel metrics for gas cutters.

columns.MACHINE_NAME: VARCHAR - The physical identifier of the cutter asset (e.g., GasCutting1)
columns.NET_TRAVEL_IN_MM: NUMBER - Total physical linear distance processed in millimeters
columns.NET_O2_CONSUMPTION_METER1: NUMBER - Oxygen utility volume level drawn during runs
columns.SHIFT_NAME: VARCHAR - The specific active working group (A, B, or C)

saved_questions.cached_sql: SELECT COUNT(SPAN) as total_anomalies FROM V_DEVIATION
SELECT MACHINE_NAME, SUM(NET_TRAVEL_IN_MM) FROM V_SUMMARIZE_GASCUTTING_MACHINE GROUP BY MACHINE_NAME
